cleavage agent: we found that intravenous administration of recombinant DPPIII
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy of 28%
instrument: tandem mass spectrometry analyses were carried out using Orbitrap Q Exactive HF mass spectrometry
ionization type: The effluent was introduced into an electrospray ionization source operated with positive ion mode
labeling: the whole peptidomics analysis was conducted
